personal.name: Michael Shuff
personal.title: Staff Systems Architect | AI Safeguards & Adversarial Researcher

bio: Systems-focused builder with a 23-year technical trajectory rooted in a lifelong obsession with systems analysis and reverse-engineering, beginning in 1998. Complemented by 5+ years of professional leadership driving $30M+ in ARR through global-scale discovery platforms and scaling multi-continental retail infrastructure for the world’s largest brands. Leverages decades of systems-level intuition to prioritize deterministic integrity, currently specializing in AI Safeguards through the engineering of neuro-symbolic circuit breakers to mitigate deceptive model behaviors

experience.title: IC2 Software Engineer
bullets: Built real-time fitment POC that closed RealTruck after 7-month evaluation vs Algolia; client paid 5× Algolia’s rate.
Fitment system reused across CarParts, Classic Industries, and active POCs — foundational in $30M+ ARR conversion pipeline.
Created Constructor’s first B2B sandbox with fitment, now reused in multiple verticals

Lead Technical Architect for the first Hebrew/RTL search integration in Israel (Super-Pharm); engineered bidirectional personalization logic to maintain 100% catalog integrity across multi-million SKU pharmaceutical inventories.
Bridged visibility gaps between engineering effort and revenue attribution; documented internal value contributions.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer / Customer Reliability Engineer
bullets: Deployed new DevOps SOPs for monitoring and prioritizing escalation tickets across all engineering teams.
Conducted daily monitoring of AWS Lambdas, SQS Queues, and S3 via Amazon Cloudwatch Log Groups and Insights to ensure system high availability
Monitored Stage, QA, and Production environments, utilizing New Relic APM (Application Performance Monitoring)
Designed and developed a new clinical research platform using Next.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, React Composition, and Material-UI.
Completely automated full end-to-end/integration testing utilizing Jest and Cypress framework with custom fixtures

experience.title: Technical Career Coach & Instructional Assistant
bullets: Mentored over 75 graduates for software engineering roles through technical interviews, DS&A whiteboarding, and architectural code walkthroughs.
Taught over 70 students ES6, OOP, unit testing, and scalable full-stack development curriculum.
Reviewed hundreds of monthly projects, providing feedback on system design and debugging complex logic, maintaining high student success.

experience.title: App Academy
bullets: Intensive software engineering bootcamp prioritizing Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and Agile/Scrum methodology
